content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.token_orchestrator
FILE: cosmos/core/token_orchestrator.py (686 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Dynamic Token Orchestrator
======================================

Manages token budgets across the entire agent collective:
- Per-agent budget allocation based on tier (LOCAL / API_STANDARD / API_PREMIUM)
- Grok+Kimi tandem sessions with intelligent handoff
- Automatic rebalancing based on u

CLASSES:
- AgentTier(Enum)
- AgentBudget
- TandemSession
- AllocationResult
- OrchestratorSnapshot
- TokenOrchestrator: Central token budget manager for the Cosmos collective.
  Methods: async def allocate(self, agent_id: str, task_type: str, estimated_tokens: int) -> AllocationResult
  Methods: async def report_usage(self, agent_id: str, input_tokens: int, output_tokens: int, task_type: str='c
  Methods: async def start_tandem(self, task: str, task_type: str='chat') -> TandemSession
  Methods: async def tandem_handoff(self, session_id: str, context_summary: str) -> str
  Methods: async def rebalance(self)
  Methods: async def get_cheapest_adequate(self, task_type: str, min_quality: float=0.6) -> str
  Methods: def get_dashboard(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def start_background_orchestration(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_token_orchestrator() -> TokenOrchestrator
